title: Work Item Relations Graph — 3D force-directed Obsidian-style globe on the Work Items page
scope: Add a new tab to the Work Items page at /work-items/work-item-relations rendering a 3D force-directed graph of the work-item hierarchy: Epic / Story / Defect / Task. Nodes are coloured by type, hub-sized by descendant count, and connected via artefact.parent_artefact_id edges. Mouse-drag rotates the globe; the toolbar exposes search, type filters, depth slider, neighbour-mode and (P3) saved views, mini-map, label declutter. Stack: 3d-force-graph on top of Three.js + d3-force-3d, with route-level dynamic({ ssr: false }) import to keep the chunk lazy. v1 ships parent edges only; work_item_links (blocks/depends/relates/duplicates) is reserved as PLA-0036 follow-up.
value: Gives teams a data-centric Obsidian-style view of how work clusters at tenant scale. The 55,659-row test seed already in place exposes natural epic constellations and shows backlog density, hub items, and orphans at a glance. Lays the groundwork for a richer relationship graph once work_item_links lands (PLA-0036).
implementation_plan: Task 1: Backend — recursive-CTE descendant-count query against vector_artefacts.artefacts, scoped by subscription/workspace.
Task 2: Backend — GET /api/v2/work-items/relations route handler returning {nodes, edges, meta} payload with 30s private cache.
Task 3: Backend — update openapi-v2.yaml with /work-items/relations spec; document 100k-row truncation threshold.
Task 4: Frontend — convert app/(user)/work-items/ from a flat page into a layout+tabs route group per docs/c_c_secondary_nav_deeplink.md; add tabs 'list' and 'work-item-relations'; redirect old page.
Task 5: Frontend — install 3d-force-graph + three-spritetext (three already pinned via PortfolioGraphChart.tsx).
Task 6: Frontend — scaffold app/components/WorkItemRelations/ orchestrator + useRelationsData SWR hook.
Task 7: Frontend — RelationsGraph.tsx Three.js canvas (dynamic ssr:false), parent edges, type-coloured nodes, hub sizing.
Task 8: Frontend — RelationsToolbar.tsx (search, type filter, depth slider, neighbour-mode); RelationsSidebar.tsx (selected-node detail); RelationsMiniMap.tsx (P3).
Task 9: Frontend — search → fly-to camera; neighbour-mode BFS at depth N with non-neighbour dimming.
Task 10: Performance — d3-force-3d in a Web Worker; sessionStorage position cache keyed by (tenant, filterHash); distance-based LOD for labels.
Task 11: Performance — bundle-size verification via next build analyser; ensure Three stays in the lazy chunk.
Task 12: Saved views (P3) — schema decision + UI wiring.
Task 13: Tests — Playwright E2E smoke (page loads, graph renders, search highlights, sidebar opens).
Task 14: Realtime — subscribe to existing useRefetchOnPush topic for work-item changes; debounced refetch only when tab visible.
Task 15: Docs — docs/c_c_work_item_relations.md (API shape, perf budget, PLA-0036 follow-up pointer).
areas_impacted: Backend: app/api/v2/work-items/relations/route.ts (new route handler) + app/lib/v2/db.ts (existing pool reused)
Frontend: app/(user)/work-items/ converted to layout-shell route group; app/(user)/work-items/list/page.tsx, app/(user)/work-items/work-item-relations/page.tsx
Docs: Vector_Scope.md (B19), docs/c_c_work_item_relations.md (new), docs/c_plan_index.md (PLA-0035 + PLA-0036 placeholder)
feature_list: Tab on Work Items page at /work-items/work-item-relations
Type-coloured nodes (Epic / Story / Defect / Task) with hub size proportional to descendantCount
Toolbar: search, type filter, depth slider, neighbour-mode toggle
Selected-node sidebar with title/type/state/parent/child count + open-in-new-tab
Web Worker layout + sessionStorage position cache
PLA-0036 placeholder: work_item_links table for non-tree edges (blocks/depends/relates/duplicates)
features_extended: Work Items page — gains a second tab beyond the existing list view
Secondary-nav deep-link pattern (PLA-0018) — adopted by Work Items for the first time
Existing useRefetchOnPush realtime invalidation — extended to refresh the graph when work-items mutate

acceptance_criteria.criterion: GET /api/v2/work-items/relations returns a {nodes, edges, meta} payload sourced from vector_artefacts.artefacts with descendantCount populated via recursive CTE
acceptance_criteria.proven_by: curl smoke test against local Next dev (:5101); manual JSON inspection vs SQL count

acceptance_criteria.criterion: /work-items/work-item-relations route mounts a 3D globe rendering all parent-child edges from the test seed (~55k nodes)
acceptance_criteria.proven_by: manual browser test on the Work Items tab; mouse-drag rotates the sphere; nodes coloured by type

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Work Items page has two bookmarkable tabs ('List' and 'Work Item Relations') under the secondary-nav deep-link convention
acceptance_criteria.proven_by: navigate to /work-items/list and /work-items/work-item-relations directly; tab highlight matches; lint:tab-deep-link green

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Search box on the toolbar finds a node by title and animates camera fly-to within 1.5s
acceptance_criteria.proven_by: manual test: type partial title, click result, camera lerps to node centre

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Neighbour-mode dims non-neighbours and highlights the selected sub-graph at the chosen depth (1–6)
acceptance_criteria.proven_by: manual test: select an epic at depth=2, verify only its stories+defects+tasks remain bright

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Three.js + 3d-force-graph stay in a route-level lazy chunk and do not enter the main bundle
acceptance_criteria.proven_by: next build analyser report; chunk diff vs main branch

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Web Worker handles layout — main thread stays responsive during initial 55k-node simulation
acceptance_criteria.proven_by: Chrome DevTools Performance recording shows main-thread free during cooldown ticks

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Playwright E2E smoke passes — page loads, graph renders >0 nodes, search highlights a node, sidebar opens on click
acceptance_criteria.proven_by: CI green on the new spec

risks.risk: Three.js + Next SSR — window/document undefined errors during server render of the new page
risks.mitigation: route-level dynamic(() => import, { ssr: false }); RelationsGraph is a client-only component; verified by hard refresh + view-source containing no canvas markup

risks.risk: 55k-node initial layout freezes the main thread for 5–15s
risks.mitigation: d3-force-3d runs in a Web Worker; cap cooldownTicks at ~120; persist final positions in sessionStorage so re-entry is instant

risks.risk: Bundle bloat — Three core ≈600 kB raw could regress main bundle size if accidentally eager-imported
risks.mitigation: next build analyser check before merge; explicit dynamic import boundary; CI check on chunk size

risks.risk: Tab conversion of app/(user)/work-items/page.tsx breaks bookmarks pointing to /work-items
risks.mitigation: page.tsx replaced with redirect('/work-items/list'); manual smoke test of the legacy URL

risks.risk: Label clutter at zoom-out makes the graph unreadable (the Obsidian failure mode)
risks.mitigation: distance-based LOD — three-spritetext only renders for nodes within camera radius < threshold OR in selection; hover-only labels for non-hubs

risks.risk: 500k-node tenant exhausts client memory and JSON payload bandwidth
risks.mitigation: v1 documents truncation flag; PLA-0035 perf doc tracks v2 strategy (server-side precompute, GPU instancing, cursor pagination)

references.label: Vector_Scope.md — B19. Work Item Relations Graph
docs/c_c_dev_ui_primitives.md — confirms .dui-* is /dev-only (this is a /work-items user page)
three-spritetext — text labels in Three scenes
